data.title: KBRA Assigns A+ Rating, Stable Outlook to City Colleges of Chicago, IL Unlimited Tax Obligations
data.description: In New York, KBRA has assigned a long-term rating of A+ to the Unlimited Tax General Obligation Bonds (Dedicated Revenues), Series 2026 by Community College District Number 508, also known as City Colleges of Chicago. The Series 2026 Bonds will support projects in the District's capital improvement plan, capitalized interest up to 2026, a Bond Insurance Policy premium, and issuance expenses.
Genesis Reports Fourth Quarter and 2025 Results

data.title: LiuGong at CONEXPO 2026  |  Electric and Integrated Solutions
data.description: At the CONEXPO-CON/AGG 2026 event in Las Vegas on March 5, 2026, LiuGong (stock symbol: 000528.SZ) showcased a total of 13 machines from various product categories. The theme of their presentation was "Tough Customers. Tough Equipment." These machines catered to a wide range of applications including urban construction, quarrying, mining, and large-scale infrastructure projects.

data.title: Accrete AI named to the Forbes 2026 America's Best Startup Employers List for the Fourth Year
data.description: On March 5, 2026, Accrete, Inc., a AI company with dual applications, established in 2017 and located in Lower Manhattan, revealed that its Knowledge Engine platform incorporates institutional knowledge, judgment, and expertise into AI agents for improved decision-making.

data.title: Valero Energy Corporation Announces Pricing of Notes Offering
data.description: In San Antonio, Valero Energy Corporation (NYSE: VLO) has announced the pricing of a public offering of $850 million aggregate principal amount of 5.150% Senior Notes due 2036. The offering is anticipated to close on March 10, 2026, pending customary closing conditions. Valero plans to utilize the net proceeds for various general corporate purposes, such as the repayment, repurchase, or redemption of its existing 7.65% notes.

data.title: Nvidia CEO cites potential IPOs for halting investments in OpenAI and Anthropic, amid controversy.
data.description: The CEO of Nvidia, Jensen Huang, attributed the halt in the chip giant's investment streak to upcoming IPOs. This development comes at a time when both of the company's AI laboratories are embroiled in controversies.
STATE DET: UNITED STATES AND VENEZUELA'S INTERIM AUTHORITIES HAVE AGREED TO RE-ESTABLISH DIPLOMATIC AND CONSULAR RELATIONS.

data.title: Power Integrations Reports Inducement Grants under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4)
data.description: In San José, California, Power Integrations (Nasdaq: POWI) revealed granting 21,595 restricted stock units (RSUs) and 2,786 performance stock units (PSUs) to new employees who joined in February 2026. The PSUs will be prorated according to hire dates as per the offer terms. These grants were provided under Power Integrations’ Amended and Restated 2025 Inducement Award Plan.

data.title: Rumble Reports Weak Q4, But Company Says It's At An Inflection Point
data.description: Rumble Inc (NASDAQ: RUM) released its Q4 financial results after the market closed. The report revealed that the company missed analyst estimates, with fourth-quarter revenue at $27.07 million, lower than the expected $27.62 million. Additionally, Rumble reported a loss of 13 cents per share, not meeting the anticipated seven cents per share. The company disclosed having 52 million shares in circulation. The stock is currently encountering resistance and facing a downward trend as a result of these figures. Further details can be found on the source platform.

data.title: Roblox implements AI to instantly replace blocked messages with appropriate text, enhancing user experience and enforcing rules.
data.description: Roblox has introduced a new AI feature aimed at maintaining readability of conversations while upholding platform regulations. This new feature automatically substitutes blocked messages with rewritten text. This initiative ensures that platform rules are enforced, with the system quickly adapting to keep conversations intact. The AI's functionality highlights Roblox's commitment to providing a safe online environment for its users, prioritizing adherence to guidelines. This innovation showcases the platform's dedication to facilitating positive interactions and safeguarding its community.

data.title: Marquis Who's Who Recognizes J. Michael Ertel, BSEE, MSIA, CBI, M&AMI, CM&AA, for Excellence in Business Consulting
data.description: In March 5, 2026, Marquis Who's Who paid tribute to the late J. Michael Ertel, who held various titles such as BSEE, MSIA, CBI, M&AMI, and CM&AA, for his significant impact in the fields of business consulting and mergers and acquisitions. Mr. Ertel, who passed away in 2025, was acknowledged for his lasting contributions to these sectors.

data.title: Improving your biological age gap is associated with better brain health
data.description: Key Points: A study with a sample size of 250,000 individuals revealed that narrowing the difference between your biological age and chronological age may lead to decreased stroke risk and enhanced brain well-being. The research included analyzing 18 biomarkers in participants' blood to assess their biological age. Furthermore, a segment of the participants...

data.title: Trump's Maritime Insurance Order Sparks Relief Rally: 10 Stocks Moving
data.description: The markets experienced a significant rebound during Tuesday afternoon following a statement made by President Donald Trump on Truth Social. In his post, Trump revealed that he had directed the U.S. Development Finance Corporation to offer political risk insurance and financial guarantees for all maritime trade passing through the Strait of Hormuz. Specifically, Trump stated, "Effective immediately, I have ordered the United States Development Finance Corporation (DFC) to provide, at a very reasonable price, political risk insurance and guarantees for the financial security of all maritime trade, especially energy, traveling through the Gulf." Additionally, Trump mentioned that the U.S. Navy is prepared to accompany tankers through the Strait of Hormuz. This announcement marked the first tangible policy response addressing concerns about energy supply disruptions, which had triggered a sell-off earlier in the session. By 2:50 p.m. in New York, the S&P 500 had reduced its midday loss from 1.5% to just 0.6%.
